title: adelmeria alpinum
intro: Adelmeria alpinum, also known as the Alpine Adelmeria, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Adelmeria alpinum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which make it a potential remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Adelmeria alpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
